summary: Elevate Quantum, along with partners Q‑CTRL, QuantWare, Qblox, Maybell Quantum, and Arrow Electronics, has launched the Quantum Platform for the Advancement of Commercialization (Q‑PAC), the United States’ first commercially deployable open architecture quantum system. Achieved in just five months since announcement in November 2025, this rapid deployment at Denver’s Quantum Commons campus showcases a new, modular Quantum Utility Block architecture. The initial system features a 17-qubit processor, with plans to scale to 100‑qubit‑class processors by 2027. Qblox’s control electronics and Maybell Quantum’s cryogenics form a transparent hardware stack, while Q‑CTRL’s software automates calibration and error suppression. Q‑PAC offers a reproducible, commercial-grade solution enabling industry and research users to access integrated quantum computing capabilities.
